title: Same Item Multiple Boards Integration Limit
excerpt: I know there is a limit to 10,000 connected items per board and the amount of boards you have changes per plan. However, my team is considering integrating the Same Item Multiple Boards app to help with processes and we …

posts.author: halleashcraft (Halle Ashcraft)
posts.cookedHtml: I know there is a limit to 10,000 connected items per board and the amount of boards you have changes per plan. However, my team is considering integrating the Same Item Multiple Boards app to help with processes and we are wondering if the limit to the connected items change. And what that limit is?

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I’m from Same Item Multiple Boards. Do you refer to the limit of connected items you can have per item? SIMB doesn’t affect that limit, if that answers your question
